feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Testing and Analysis
feed.subtitle: ABAP Testing and Analysis Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Need documentation on ABP changes when upgrading from SAP 4.7 to ERP 6
entry.content: Hello, We are getting ready to upgrade from SAP 4.7 to ECC 6.0. Where can I find ABAP changes, what's obsolete, etc?

entry.title: Custom Partner Function is deleted after saving
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Asking for your expertise on a problem I encountered. In VA01, when I save the sales document, the custom partner function is deleted. When looking in MV45AFZZ, I can't seem to find where this deletion of partner function is happening. 

I already tried debugging in USER_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE and USER_SAVE_DOCUMENT but no deletion happened. Wanted to know if you have any idea how to approach this type of problem.

entry.title: scheduling agreement - Output issue
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I need your support to understand and solve an issue related to Scheduling agreement, suddenly, the SA release copy was received by another user. However, no one updated the order from the planning side, yet the order was still received.

SA release copy email should be received by user who creates/modifies it.

Could you please guide how to solve this issue?

Thank you,

entry.title: eCATT. SAP Strategy.
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can someone let me know if SAP has a specific roadmap for eCATT as a tool?

I mean, eCATT will be supported for future SAP_BASIS releases?

Are there new strategies from SAP to provide other Testing & Automation Tools?

Thank you,
Alfonso.

ABAP Testing and Analysis

entry.title: Curious question about the custom code analysis, scoping and adaptation
entry.content:
Hi,

Recently we started S4 Conversion migration topic. At this moment we have activated the custom code usage tracking(SCMON) in prod systems couple of weeks back. On the other hand also, we had run the ATC with central ATC system (NW 7.51) despite the recommended is 7.52 version. The ATC resulted something like below for our ERP dev system

  • around 80K prio 1
  • around 12k prio 2
  • around 60K prio 3

We used S4HANA_READINESS_REMOTE check variant for ATC run. Out of these 150K items, the categorization is roughly as below.

So we have downloaded the result list and found some interesting topics and along with few open questions to check with the community as below.

1. Out of 150K check items, there are 132K duplicates found and only 27K are unique records. Not sure why so many duplicate was reported in ATC result. Does this is common behavior in ATC findings? 

2. After excluding $TMP objects the final unique came around 12K check items. So, I'm curious to know now how many items of this we can do the adaptation before SUM and how do we need to categorize those which can be done with S4HANA upgradation?

3. I agree we need to wait few more months of SCMON data from the productive system, but once that is ready how do we need to exclude those from ATC result list to focus only the final scope of custom code to do adaptation during preperation and realization phase.

4. Does there any general recommendation on what is the best practice to do estimation and potential changes that need to be done for each of 6 different check categories in this check variant? This is crucial for us to do the effort estimation with t-shirt sizing to know roughly which type of check message is needed how much time and how the change looks like in general for each of this check message type.

5. Any help document from SAP about Prio1 , 2 & 3 about it's definition. Which one it's must to fix for conversion project? I remember Thomas Fiedler mentioned that prio 1 and 2 is must to fix. Not sure is this still valid statement or not.

6. If we don't use NW 7.52 for remote ATC, do we see the difference in ATC result list or it's only the UI (like more statistic categories) differences which help to analyze the AT result?

Best Regards,

Praveen

entry.title: CSAP_ORD_BOM_CREATE issue
entry.content:
I try to run the BAPI function CSAP_ORD_BOM_DELETE by setting value of 

  • "ORDER"
  • "POSITION"
  • "MATERIAL"
  • "PLANT"
  • "BOM_USAGE"

But the exception happened with AbapMessageClass = "29" and AbapMessageNumber = "853"  (Message Short Text: Data is incomplete).

Please kindly support what's the problem. Many thanks!

entry.title: Fuzzy Search in cds query
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is it possible to use fuzzy searches (*, %, ?, etc.) in the input parameters of Analysis using CDS View as the data source?

Now I get an error saying pattern selection is not supported.
If possible, please let me know how to implement it.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Unable to display SQL trace in ABAP Profiler
entry.content:
Hi community,

I've traced a background process with ABAP profiler, with the "Enable SQL Trace" option active in preferences tab.

But when I get into the trace, in the overview tab I can't see the SQL trace from Analysis Tools

 



Do you know if there's any configuration missing? Thanks

entry.title: Problem with ALV column displaying as exponent instead of quantity (len15, dec3)
entry.content:
This is for an older version of ABAP - SAP_BASIS 740 support pack 0010

I am having a problem with a value being displayed as an exponent when I want a "normal" number. The value is part of a case statement and regarded as a case statement by the database and therefore cannot be cast.

I tried a number of solutions on the CDS side, doing the case statement differently and also casting.

And on the ALV side I tried to format the column differently with:

lo_alv->get_columns( )->get_column( )->set_decfloat_style( ) .
"SET_DECFLOAT_STYLE" is proposed here:
https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/display-float-data-in-salv-table-without-exponent/td-p/10530770
And is accepted as the solution but I tried all 6 values for the parameter 00-06 with and without single quotes and none of them cause any change in the output of the ALV column.
and
lo_alv->get_columns( )->get_column( )->set_decimals( ).
and
lo_alv->get_columns( )->get_column( )->set_decimals_column( ).
and
lo_alv->get_columns( )->get_column( )->set_technical( ).
As experiments to see if it would help but it did nothing

I don't mind doing this a bit differently on either the CDS View or in the ABAP program but a usable solution would be really appreciated.

My last resort is to loop through the internal table to manipulate the data. The big advantage of CDS is code push-down which means I handle the solution in the virtual data model eliminating the need to loop through the data on the ABAP server.

First CDS View:

 

define view ZB_MC_SALESORDER_ITM_QTY as select from vbap as SalesOrderItm

    left outer join ZB_MC_SALESORDER_ITM_FLOW as SalesOrderFlow
      on  SalesOrderItm.vbeln = SalesOrderFlow.vbelv
      and SalesOrderItm.posnr = SalesOrderFlow.posnv
{
    vbeln,
    posnr,
    matnr,
    kwmeng,
    //Confirmed Qty
    case when SalesOrderFlow.rfmng > SalesOrderItm.kwmeng then SalesOrderItm.kwmeng else SalesOrderFlow.rfmng end as ConfirmedQty,
    //Open Qty
    case
        when SalesOrderItm.kwmeng is null and SalesOrderFlow.rfmng is null then 0.000
        when SalesOrderItm.kwmeng is null and SalesOrderFlow.rfmng is not null then 0.000
        when SalesOrderItm.kwmeng is not null and SalesOrderFlow.rfmng is null then SalesOrderItm.kwmeng
        when SalesOrderFlow.rfmng > SalesOrderItm.kwmeng then 0.000
        when SalesOrderFlow.rfmng <= SalesOrderItm.kwmeng then SalesOrderItm.kwmeng - SalesOrderFlow.rfmng 
        else 0.000 end 
        as OpenQty   
}

 

Second CDS View:

 

define view ZB_MC_SALESORDER_ITM_FLOW as select from vbfa
{
    vbelv,
    posnv,
    sum(rfmng) as rfmng
} group by vbelv, posnv

 

ABAP Program:

 

TABLES: vbap .

SELECT-OPTIONS: s_vbeln FOR vbap-vbeln ,
                s_posnr FOR vbap-posar ,
                s_matnr FOR vbap-matnr .


START-OF-SELECTION .

  SELECT * FROM zb_mc_salesorder_itm_qty
    INTO TABLE (lt_output)
    WHERE vbeln IN @s_vbeln
      AND posnr IN @s_posnr
      AND matnr IN @s_matnr .

  TRY.
      CALL METHOD cl_salv_table=>factory
        IMPORTING
          r_salv_table = DATA(lo_alv)
        CHANGING
          t_table      = lt_output.
    CATCH cx_salv_msg INTO DATA(lo_alv_msg) .
      MESSAGE lo_alv_msg->get_text( ) TYPE if_xo_const_message=>error .
  ENDTRY.

  lo_alv->display( ) .

entry.title: User exit for tcode vf11
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need to find an user exit for transaction vf11. The requirement is that I need to fetch the number of the newly created billing document number and save it in a Z table. The problem is that I have seen the forum and some of the suggested user exits, but in all of them the field vbkrk-vbeln is not yet filled. 

May anyone know such an user exit?

Thank you and regards,

R

entry.title: Unable to create a ATC variant S4 Hana 2022
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to perform cloud readiness check for our SAP objects in S4 Hana 2022 system. As suggested in the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-the-abap-test-cockpit-supports-you-to-adopt-abap-cloud/ba-p/13548202, we are trying to create a new ATC variant to include cloud readiness checks.

While doing this we are getting an error "The implementing class CL_CI_TEST_EXTENDED_CHECK_SEC is marked as internal".

Can you please help with this error.

Regards,

Chaitanya

entry.title: It is not possible to debug programs in SAP GUI for HTML
entry.content:
I am logged into my SAP session, on Chrome, and a simple program:

The program executes and runs, no problem. I cannot however debug this program, or any program for that matter.

All my settings are correct:

However when I try and set an external breakpoint:

I get the following message:

This is odd because I am trying to set an external breakpoint! Has anyone else had this problem and solved it in any browser?

All help is really greatly appreciated.

Kind regards, 

Warren

entry.title: how to assign the FICO Form in the place of standard form
entry.content:
how to assign customised sapscript form in the place of standard one for cash journal in FICO.... can anybody give me the exact solution I tried to assigned it in ob96 and then fbcjc3 but the output in fbcj is standard form only....

can anybody give me the solution for this problem

entry.title: ABAP Unit for local classes inside function group?
entry.content:
I have local class(LCL_CUT) created inside function group ZFG_BP.

method get_activity of class lcl_cut, tries to access global variables of ZFG_BP.

 

METHOD get_activity
 IF gv_act_id = 'YCUS'. "this gv_act_id is part of Fn Group ZFG_BP
   **logic to calculate*
 ENDIF.
ENDMETHOD.

 

 I need to write abap unit for method get_activity, but I don't know how would I set gv_act_id  = 'YCUS' for my unit test method call?

As of now gv_act_id = ' ', which makes sense because I am calling this method individually and there is no prior call/screen click to set gv_act_id value.

entry.title: Unable to create delivery order using the BAPI BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS from custom program
entry.content:
Hi ABAP Experts,

When I am trying to create delivery from SE37 using the BAPI BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS

It is creating the delivery successfully.

 

But when Executing through custom program with the same parameter as mentioned above and same BAPI it is giving error.

I checked in MM03 , this material and its sales org are maintained properly still I am getting this error.

My query is how can we sort out this issue.

entry.title: Send notifications in ATC only in error cases
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to use ATC to run unit tests in packages automatically and periodically.

Furthermore I would like to send a notification, e.g. via mail or SBWP, for each run to specific receivers.

So far, I know that this is possible.

Now, I am looking for a way only to send notifications if at least 1 unit tests fails.

Is this possible? Can anyone give me a tip?

BR

entry.title: How to transfer MASTER RECIPE with MIC inside from ECC to S4HANA through Idoc
entry.content:
Hi all.

I am trying to migrate PP data from ECC to S4HANA and have a lot of issues of MASTER RECIPE (not Routing). I established the connection between both systems, I have created partner profile and distribution model. I am using message type LOIROU (it seems this is only support for Routing, please clarify me if I am wrong).

Idoc generated successfully and sent from ECC to S4HANA but cannot post. I checked the IDOC sent from ECC and found that some information are missed  such as MIC in each phase, no destination. I wonder that whether SAP support for MASTER RECIPE or NOT. Most of answer in this community is solved for ROUTING only. Need your help to clarify me how to transfer, what message type.... I saw that LTMC template of MASTER RECIPE not include MIC inside and though that SAP is not support for MASTER RECIPE.

Please help. Thank you.

entry.title: do I need a test double for 'me' method call in method under test?
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a method for which I am writing ABAP Unit test:

 

METHOD do_sth.
"Below method call sets a global attribute value
me->get_facet( ).

"Below method call returns internal table
lt_catlog = me->build_catalog( ).

**other code in method**

ENDMETHOD.

 

do I need to mock the above two method calls as well? how can I achieve this?
I think get_facet( ) and build_catalog( ) calls need mocking. Moreover I have already written test for these two methods individually.

entry.title: Can Anyone tell me how to use this following BAPI to create multiple inforecords?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am working on a program where I am uploading an excel file and posting the data into the bapi  me_inforecord_maintain_multi  .

But Inforecords Number not getting generated from the bapi, though sy-subrc = 0 after the bapi execution!

Below Posting my code. For each item there should be unique inforecods number, means for 5 materials in the file there should be 5 infnr.

Getting bapi lt_return table message as "material is not activated" .

Tried with leading zeros in matnr , still not working.

 


  CALL FUNCTION 'ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE'
    EXPORTING
      filename                = p_file
      i_begin_col             = '1'
      i_begin_row             = p_brow
      i_end_col               = '170'
      i_end_row               = p_erow
    TABLES
      intern                  = it_exload
    EXCEPTIONS
      inconsistent_parameters = 1
      upload_ole              = 2
      OTHERS                  = 3.

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'Problem in excel sheet'  TYPE 'E'.
    LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT zno
      FROM zinfo
      ORDER BY zno DESCENDING
      INTO @DATA(l_sl)
      UP TO 1 ROWS.
  ENDSELECT.

  l_sl = l_sl + 1.

  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
    EXPORTING
      input  = l_sl
    IMPORTING
      output = l_sl.

  SORT it_exload BY row col.

  LOOP AT it_exload INTO wa_exload.

    CASE wa_exload-col.
      WHEN '0001'.
        lw_acc-matnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0002'.
        lw_acc-lifnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0003'.
        lw_acc-ekorg = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0004'.
        lw_acc-werks = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0005'.
        lw_acc-ekgrp = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0006'.
        lw_acc-aplfz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0007'.
        CALL FUNCTION 'KCD_EXCEL_DATE_CONVERT'
          EXPORTING
            excel_date  = wa_exload-value
            date_format = 'TMJ'
          IMPORTING
            sap_date    = wa_exload-value.

        lw_acc-valid_from = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0008'.
        lw_acc-waers = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0009'.
        lw_acc-netpr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0010'.
        lw_acc-peinh = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0011'.
        lw_acc-bprme = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0012'.
        lw_acc-bpumz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0013'.
        lw_acc-bpumn = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0014'.
        lw_acc-lmein = wa_exload-value.

    ENDCASE.

    AT END OF row.


      lw_acc-zno = l_sl.
      lw_acc-vaild_to = '99991231'.
      lw_acc-kschl = 'PB00'.

      APPEND lw_acc TO lt_acc.
      CLEAR lw_acc.
    ENDAT.

  ENDLOOP.


  SELECT
          a~matnr,
          b~meins

    FROM @LT_acc AS a INNER JOIN
    mara AS b
    ON
      ltrim( a~matnr, '0' ) = ltrim( b~matnr, '0' )
    INTO TABLE @DATA(it_unit).




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa_acc).

    IF wa_acc-matnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lifnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekorg IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-werks IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekgrp IS INITIAL
    OR wa_acc-valid_from IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-waers IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-netpr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-peinh IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bprme IS INITIAL .

      MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
      LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
    ENDIF.

    READ TABLE it_unit INTO DATA(wa_unit) WITH  KEY matnr = wa_acc-matnr.

    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_OUTPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa_unit-meins
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa_unit-meins.


    IF sy-subrc = 0.

      IF wa_unit-meins <> wa_acc-bprme.
        IF wa_acc-bpumz IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bpumn IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lmein IS INITIAL.
          MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
          LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDLOOP.




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa).


    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-matnr IMPORTING output = wa-matnr.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-lifnr IMPORTING output = wa-lifnr.



APPEND VALUE #( material =  wa-matnr
                vendor =   wa-lifnr )
 TO itab1.

APPEND VALUE #( material =  'X'
                vendor =   'X' )
 TO itab2.

APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = wa-ekorg  plant = wa-werks pur_group = wa-ekgrp plnd_delry = wa-aplfz gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab3.
APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = 'X'  plant = 'X' pur_group = 'X' plnd_delry = 'X' gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab4.
APPEND VALUE #( valid_from = wa-valid_from valid_to = wa-vaild_to  )
 TO itab5.


  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_INPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa-lmein
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa-lmein.


APPEND VALUE #( cond_type = wa-kschl currency = wa-waers cond_value = wa-netpr  cond_p_unt  = wa-peinh
cond_unit = wa-bprme numerator = wa-bpumz  denominator = wa-bpumn base_uom = wa-lmein )
 TO itab6.


    MODIFY lt_acc FROM wa.


  ENDLOOP.




  CALL FUNCTION 'ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI'
    IMPORTING
      et_eina       = lt_eina_e
      et_eine       = lt_eine_e
    TABLES
      t_eina        = itab1
      t_einax       = itab2
      t_eine        = itab3
      t_einex       = itab4
      cond_validity = itab5
      condition     = itab6
      return        = lt_return.











  IF sy-subrc = 0.

    LOOP AT lt_acc ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).

      READ TABLE lt_eina_e ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs1>) WITH  KEY material = <fs>-matnr.

      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        <fs>-infnr = <fs1>-info_rec.
      ENDIF.

    ENDLOOP.

entry.title: How to create a test double for method of another class?
entry.content:
I've encountered a problem with a problem about mocking method of another class for developing test class. I use test doubles in order to mock date, but it can mock only the interface, not the class. Is it any possibilities in ABAP to mock the method of another class? 

It will be great if you provide with example)
